text:
Once there were three owls. One was big brown owl. One was small tinker owl. One was grey.

They all loved sweets.

One made a sweet house for winter. One loved sweets like apples.

The big owl just liked sweets.

One day, big owl saw a bag of apples.

"More!" big owl cheered.

They ate till night.

* * *

But they didn't fly away. They slept. A squirrel gave them apples.

They woke. They flew high. They found nightbirds.

The stars twinkled like stars.

* * *

They slept. They dreamed.

The stars went away.

* * *

Oh no.

They woke. Owl sun.

"We think?"

"We miss the stars." 

They had feathers like stars.

They flew. They found stars. So many!

They lived.

* * *

Sometimes they'd sleep.

Sometimes they'd dream.

* * *

That was enough.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
